dsf:From.dsf:SQL: LEFT JOIN dbo.Account as accAsg on accAsg.ID = itsm.AssignedAccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType as genResMetTyp on genResMetTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND genResMetTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTypeCode as secIncTypCod on secIncTypCod.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentTypeCodeGuid AND secIncTypCod.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentUrgencyCategory as secIncUrgCat on secIncUrgCat.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentUrgencyCategoryGuid AND secIncUrgCat.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentPriorityLevel as secIncPriLev on secIncPriLev.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentPriorityLevelGuid AND secIncPriLev.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResponseProcedureType as secIncResProTyp on secIncResProTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentResponseProcedureTypeGuid AND secIncResProTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentClassificationType as secIncClaTyp on secIncClaTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentClassificationTypeGuid AND secIncClaTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedUserCount as secIncAffUseCou on secIncAffUseCou.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedUserCountGuid AND secIncAffUseCou.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentRootCauseType as secIncRooCauTyp on secIncRooCauTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentRootCauseTypeGuid AND secIncRooCauTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedInformationClass as secIncAffInfCla on secIncAffInfCla.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedInformationClassGuid AND secIncAffInfCla.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN dbo.Account as accImmCorActReq on accImmCorActReq.ID = itsm.ImmediateCorrectiveActionRequestorAccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlType as secIncIncConTyp on secIncIncConTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlTypeGuid AND secIncIncConTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlStatus as secIncConSta on secIncConSta.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlStatusGuid AND secIncConSta.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlPriority as secIncConPri on secIncConPri.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlPriorityGuid AND secIncConPri.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN dbo.Account as accSecIncReq on accSecIncReq.ID = itsm.SecurityIncidentRequestorAccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentBreachVectorType as secIncBreVecTyp on secIncBreVecTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentBreachVectorTypeGuid AND secIncBreVecTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentThreatActorType as secIncThrActTyp on secIncThrActTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentThreatActorTypeGuid AND secIncThrActTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentLogicalIntrusionType as secIncLogIntTyp on secIncLogIntTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentLogicalIntrusionTypeGuid AND secIncLogIntTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentKeyBusinessImpactType as secIncKeyBusImpTyp on secIncKeyBusImpTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentKeyBusinessImpactTypeGuid AND secIncKeyBusImpTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentOutcomeType as secIncOutTyp on secIncOutTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentOutcomeTypeGuid AND secIncOutTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTheftCategory as secIncTheCat on secIncTheCat.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentTheftCategoryGuid AND secIncTheCat.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentFailureCategory as secIncFaiCat on secIncFaiCat.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentFailureCategoryGuid AND secIncFaiCat.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResolutionMethodType as secIncResMetTyp on secIncResMetTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND secIncResMetTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentImpactCategory as secIncImpCat on secIncImpCat.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentImpactCategoryGuid AND secIncImpCat.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
INNER JOIN @WorkFlowStates AS wfs ON wfs.[Value] = itsm.[State]
INNER JOIN dbo.Account AS accCreator ON accCreator.ID = itsm.AccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat2 ON ftvCat2.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat3 ON ftvCat3.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat4 ON ftvCat4.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat5 ON ftvCat5.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident
LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accRep ON accRep.ID = itsm.ReporterAccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMEntryMethodType AS itsEntMetTyp ON itsEntMetTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid AND itsEntMetTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

DataSource.SQL: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, #ROWNUM# FROM ( SELECT itsm.ID #ADDCOLUMN# FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsm INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCom ON ftvCom.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCompanyIdent #ADDFROM# WHERE itsm.[State] NOT IN (@DeletedState,@ClosedState) AND ( ( itsm.State IN (@Categorization,@Analysis,@RiskValidation,@ProposedMeasureAndSolution,@ProposedMeasureAndSolutionSignificantIncident,@IncidentEvaluation,@SentToHDMZE,@SentToOKBManager,@SolutionAssignedToTeam,@SolutionAssigned,@SolutionValidation) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMOperator|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@Analysis,@ProposedMeasureAndSolution,@ProposedMeasureAndSolutionSignificantIncident,@IncidentEvaluation,@SolutionValidation) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSecurityIncidentOKB|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@RiskValidation,@SentToOKBManager) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSecurityIncidentOKBManager|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@SolutionAssignedToTeam,@SolutionAssigned) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSpecialist|]# ) ) #FILTER# ) AS tbl ) AS tbl WHERE RowNum BETWEEN @StartPage AND @EndPage

CountDataSource.SQL: SELECT COUNT(itsm.ID) FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsm INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCom ON ftvCom.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCompanyIdent WHERE itsm.[State] NOT IN (@DeletedState,@ClosedState) AND ( ( itsm.State IN (@Categorization,@Analysis,@RiskValidation,@ProposedMeasureAndSolution,@ProposedMeasureAndSolutionSignificantIncident,@IncidentEvaluation,@SentToHDMZE,@SentToOKBManager,@SolutionAssignedToTeam,@SolutionAssigned,@SolutionValidation) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMOperator|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@Analysis,@ProposedMeasureAndSolution,@ProposedMeasureAndSolutionSignificantIncident,@IncidentEvaluation,@SolutionValidation) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSecurityIncidentOKB|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@RiskValidation,@SentToOKBManager) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSecurityIncidentOKBManager|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@SolutionAssignedToTeam,@SolutionAssigned) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSpecialist|]# ) ) #FILTER#

dsf:From.dsf:SQL: LEFT JOIN dbo.Account as accAsg on accAsg.ID = itsm.AssignedAccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType as genResMetTyp on genResMetTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND genResMetTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTypeCode as secIncTypCod on secIncTypCod.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentTypeCodeGuid AND secIncTypCod.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentUrgencyCategory as secIncUrgCat on secIncUrgCat.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentUrgencyCategoryGuid AND secIncUrgCat.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentPriorityLevel as secIncPriLev on secIncPriLev.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentPriorityLevelGuid AND secIncPriLev.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResponseProcedureType as secIncResProTyp on secIncResProTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentResponseProcedureTypeGuid AND secIncResProTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentClassificationType as secIncClaTyp on secIncClaTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentClassificationTypeGuid AND secIncClaTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedUserCount as secIncAffUseCou on secIncAffUseCou.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedUserCountGuid AND secIncAffUseCou.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentRootCauseType as secIncRooCauTyp on secIncRooCauTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentRootCauseTypeGuid AND secIncRooCauTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedInformationClass as secIncAffInfCla on secIncAffInfCla.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedInformationClassGuid AND secIncAffInfCla.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN dbo.Account as accImmCorActReq on accImmCorActReq.ID = itsm.ImmediateCorrectiveActionRequestorAccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlType as secIncIncConTyp on secIncIncConTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlTypeGuid AND secIncIncConTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlStatus as secIncConSta on secIncConSta.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlStatusGuid AND secIncConSta.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlPriority as secIncConPri on secIncConPri.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlPriorityGuid AND secIncConPri.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN dbo.Account as accSecIncReq on accSecIncReq.ID = itsm.SecurityIncidentRequestorAccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentBreachVectorType as secIncBreVecTyp on secIncBreVecTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentBreachVectorTypeGuid AND secIncBreVecTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentThreatActorType as secIncThrActTyp on secIncThrActTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentThreatActorTypeGuid AND secIncThrActTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentLogicalIntrusionType as secIncLogIntTyp on secIncLogIntTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentLogicalIntrusionTypeGuid AND secIncLogIntTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentKeyBusinessImpactType as secIncKeyBusImpTyp on secIncKeyBusImpTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentKeyBusinessImpactTypeGuid AND secIncKeyBusImpTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentOutcomeType as secIncOutTyp on secIncOutTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentOutcomeTypeGuid AND secIncOutTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTheftCategory as secIncTheCat on secIncTheCat.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentTheftCategoryGuid AND secIncTheCat.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentFailureCategory as secIncFaiCat on secIncFaiCat.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentFailureCategoryGuid AND secIncFaiCat.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResolutionMethodType as secIncResMetTyp on secIncResMetTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND secIncResMetTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentImpactCategory as secIncImpCat on secIncImpCat.Guid = itsm.ITSMSecurityIncidentImpactCategoryGuid AND secIncImpCat.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
INNER JOIN @WorkFlowStates AS wfs ON wfs.[Value] = itsm.[State]
INNER JOIN dbo.Account AS accCreator ON accCreator.ID = itsm.AccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat2 ON ftvCat2.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat3 ON ftvCat3.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat4 ON ftvCat4.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat5 ON ftvCat5.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident
LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accRep ON accRep.ID = itsm.ReporterAccountID
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMEntryMethodType AS itsEntMetTyp ON itsEntMetTyp.Guid = itsm.ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid AND itsEntMetTyp.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

DataSource.SQL: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, #ROWNUM# FROM ( SELECT itsm.ID #ADDCOLUMN# FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsm INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCom ON ftvCom.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCompanyIdent #ADDFROM# WHERE itsm.[State] NOT IN (@DeletedState,@ClosedState) AND ( ( itsm.State IN (@Categorization,@Analysis,@RiskValidation,@ProposedMeasureAndSolution,@ProposedMeasureAndSolutionSignificantIncident,@IncidentEvaluation,@SentToHDMZE,@SentToOKBManager,@SolutionAssignedToTeam,@SolutionAssigned,@SolutionValidation) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMOperator|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@Analysis,@ProposedMeasureAndSolution,@ProposedMeasureAndSolutionSignificantIncident,@IncidentEvaluation,@SolutionValidation) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSecurityIncidentOKB|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@RiskValidation,@SentToOKBManager) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSecurityIncidentOKBManager|]# ) OR ( itsm.State IN (@SolutionAssignedToTeam,@SolutionAssigned) AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsm)|ITSMSpecialist|]# ) ) #FILTER# ) AS tbl ) AS tbl WHERE RowNum BETWEEN @StartPage AND @EndPage
